subcodes.first_line: The Divine Book speaketh forth at all times, and the Sun of Truth shineth from the horizon of heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الهی در جمیع احیان ناطق و افتاب حقیقت از افق سماء
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
